name: Equifax Inc.
description: Equifax Inc. is a global data, analytics, and technology company that provides information solutions and services to businesses, governments, and consumers. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, Equifax organizes, assimilates, and analyzes data on more than 820 million consumers and 91 million businesses worldwide. The company operates in three main segments: USIS (U.S. Information Solutions), Workforce Solutions, and International, offering credit reporting, identity theft protection, fraud detection, and employment verification services.
